reviews.title: Sounds Absolutely Wonderful
reviews.text:
The Audio Pro Addon T3 is an amazing Bluetooth speaker. For its size it puts out beautiful sound. Such a delight to the ears. The bass isn't overdone but rather tight and punchy. Crisp clean high end as well. Overall excellent sound. I recommend this speaker based on sound alone. 

Build quality is top notch. The design of the Addon T3 is very clean and will look great with any decor. The leather strap handle and the buttons give it a classic look reminiscent of Marshall amplifiers. 

Battery life is awesome. Seems to play forever. The usb port on back is very handy for charging your devices as well. 

If you are looking for an excellent sounding speaker with long battery life and beautiful build quality look no further. One of the better sounding bluetooth speakers I've heard in awhile.
reviews.author: joel125

reviews.title: Great Design, Compact with BIG Sound!
reviews.text:
I'd never heard of this brand before, but I want to see more from them now! This thing produces ROOM FILLING sound and great range!

The speaker is small, has really nice semi-retro controls with brushed brass accents, and is HEAVY but what I thought was cabinet heft must also be partly due to magnets inside driving deep bass and crystal clear highs... This is an elegant, well built cabinet that contributes to the amazing output of this device.

I wouldn't call this thing a "Bass blaster" but that's not the intent here - Its a "reference sound" that you get - Rich, full mids and lows, with precise and crisp highs that (to me) deliver also. The bass is rich and detailed, but is not so deep that it gets muddy. The midrange is good, but most speakers this size get a little mud in the middle, and this one is better than most.

The power cord was surprisingly a standard 2-prong cord which means replaceability isn't a problem should it be damaged, and the power supply is fully integrated into the main box. The other nice thing for global travelers such as I am, is that the box includes a standard US and an EU AC plug.

Overall this thing is QUALITY QUALITY QUALITY! Sound, packaging, industrial design, and battery life are all excellent! Its an unusual form factor for portable Bluetooth audio, but if its your style, the output won't disappoint!
reviews.author: GadgetGuy1981

reviews.title: Excellent Sound, great look, quality
reviews.text:
Small company, big sound. This little device has a great look, great sound, great battery, great functionality. The cons are almost non-existent. I really want to emphasize the sound and look of this device. It blends very well into most decor styles and is sure to surprise your family and friends. Many people don't even realize it's a speaker. 

Pros:
Balanced Sound
Loud
Look and Design
Functionality
Battery Life
Charging Port
AUX Port

This speaker is probably the best designed speaker that is also backed by really good sound. I have the grey version which is contrasted in the front by three black speaker grills. That top has a very nice copper finish with quality, strong buttons. It also has a carrying handle matching the color of the speaker. The speaker sits of 4 feet supports that give it an upward angle, a very nice touch. All ports are accessed on the back. This includes the AUX, USB, and Power port. High quality look and feel. The battery life was very good, listening to 100% volume for at least 5hours. I was not able to push it to the end, but was impressed so far. I was very happy with the loudness of the speaker, but it is definitely limited to a smaller environment if there is a lot of background noise. The sound was balanced, with the bass complementing the highs and lows well. The bass had a balance of depth and punch without being mottled. Vocals came through with clarity. I was pleased this speaker did not distort or washout the highest highs. It's clear Audio Pro went to great lengths to produce a quality product that implemented high-end design. Works great with Bluetooth and AUX. Setup takes no time at all. Multiple function buttons for volume, track change, etc. Bluetooth range was at least 30feet with through walls. Quick Charging.

Cons:
Slight inconsistency in sound
Power cord non-proprietary

As good as the sound is, the were some inconsistencies in volume change. When playing certain tracks with louder and quieter vocals, the loudness would be much less than the set point when the vocals dropped to lower levels. I haven't been able to determine whether this was on the source side or the speaker side and should not be a major concern. The power cable uses the type you'd see on a Blu-Ray player or HDTV. I would have liked to see something more common/standard. However, this is very likely due to the quality of the battery and speaker requiring and larger power output. Overall, I highly recommend this speaker.
reviews.author: TrueReviews20

reviews.title: Great portable speaker
reviews.text: When I received this product I was blown away. It looks absolutely amazing. Then when I connected it to my phone it was even better. The sound was clear and had great bass. I compared it to another high quality speaker in my room and was amazed it was just as good. It was surprising that it had great battery life as well. Awesome product.
reviews.author: HUNTER

reviews.title: Portable with great build quality and battery life
reviews.text:
Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker - White
The Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker is a compact little package that has a very unique look. When you first see it you might be surprised how small it is. I measured it at 5” high, 5 ¼” deep and 8 ½” long. Then when I picked it up I was surprised how heavy it felt. This is one solid box. The back is mostly metal and includes the AC connection, a USB port that is for charging only, AUX 3.5mm in and I counted 16 screws. The body seems to be made out of a very solid plastic and when you rap on it, it feels very solid. The controls on the top are done in a very nice looking metal plate and button controls follow that same theme. It looks very good and also at the top is the leather handle. On the front is three speakers behind metal grills. Two 2 ¾” dome tweeters and in the middle one 3.5” woofer. It supports Bluetooth 4.0 which is not the latest standard and that is too bad. With such great build quality you almost expected better. Still this is the most common Bluetooth standard you will find in most devices today. This means easy parting and good sound. One of the standout feature here is the rated battery life. Up to 30 hours at 50% volume and 12 hours at 100% volume. I can’t see it ever being used at !00% but who knows. This is a pure digital Class D amplifier. Class D amplifier are very power friendly, respond fast and are very common. This amplifier is rated at 5 watts to the twiters and 15 watts to the woofer. And the sound, well it is good and shines more on the top end. The bass shows up but it is not overwhelming. I played it in an open space and that helped it breth. It can put out room filling sound if needed. In a more closed environment like a moving vehicle the bass didn’t seem to have the same impact. I had 8 hours of playback without any problem so I wouldn’t be surprised that it can keep going. The market is loaded with portable Bluetooth speakers. This one stands out as being very well built. It doesn’t have the flashing LEDs some of the portable speakers have. But it is very unique with excellent build quality. One thing that seems missing here is lack of waterproofing. As well built and being this portable that seem like a bit of an oversight. Maybe that’s the trade off for this sound quality. The Audio Pro Addon T3 has a lot of competition in its price range. But if you're looking for day long battery life in the most portable package that is sure get smiles the T3 deserves a good look.
reviews.author: Reddog

reviews.title: Crisp Sound and Clean Design
reviews.text:
The Audio Pro Addon T3 is a smallish portable speaker that has pure, clean, neutral sound and a retro look. The sound stays sharp at any volume level. The Addon T3 is good for small to medium listening spaces.Perfect for work desk, dorm room or at home. It has a killer battery that'll last 30 hours when playing at half volume or 12 hours at full volume. The rechargeable battery is removable in case you ever need to replace it.

This is an attractive, great sounding speaker that provides form and function.
reviews.author: The34Car

reviews.title: Stunning voice quality from a tiny classic box
reviews.text:
I have tried many BT portable speakers including high end ones from Bose. I was amazed by the sound quality from Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker. Even at the max sound, I couldn't notice any distortion but high quality perfect sound for every kind of music I payed. 

Outstanding battery life. Quick Bluetooth connection. Additional aux input. Classy look with amazing audio quality. What else you want from a tiny portable bluetooth speaker? 

Downside? yes a couple of them: You cannot control T3's volume from your bluetooth connected device. Can't use USB port to power up devices such as Chromecast.

Overall, I am very satisfied with T3 and highly recommend it for audio enthusiasts.
reviews.author: Jacobs

reviews.title: Great sound, handsome speaker
reviews.text:
This speaker blew me away. It is probably one of best looking speakers I've seen. It looks great on your bookshelf. It looks elegant and refined, unlike most speakers that look "sporty." But, that elegance (at least in my opinion) means I won't be taking this out anywhere rugged. Maybe on a picnic, and while this sounds fantastic, I think it's main selling point is its design.

Sound...

Is fantastic. It has a rich satisfying sound, which brought back memories of the original Bose Wave Radio. It is amazing that this small of a box can blast such deep satisfying and resounding bass, while maintaining crystal clear clarity. The sound truly is something to behold. And it is plenty loud with no distortion. I played classical music, Disney movie music, podcasts and oldies and they all sounded great. The quality is truly remarkable. 

A few good things...

Obviously the sound and the looks, but one of the first things I've ever seen is a replaceable battery. Obviously this is new and I've had no reason to change the battery but it gives me comfort. It has a USB charging port for your phone, and since this has a rated battery of about 40 hours, it's going to outlast your phone and it's nice to be able to charge your phone. It also has an Aux cable, which in my opinion is a must. Bluetooth is great, and convenient, but I've always run into situations where the Bluetooth connection just wouldn't work. The craftsmanship. This baby has some heft to it, which I appreciate it. It is durable and you can just tell the persons who designed, engineered, and manufactured this speaker love what they do and paid close attention to the details. 

Some little quirks...

No screen. This is personal preference and not a huge deal, but there's no screen or more specifically, no volume meter. The buttons are also clicky; and loud. This sounds like a dumb thing to say, but they just have a loud unsatisfying click. The buttons don't feel flimsy, they just sound it.

All in all...

If you are looking for an elegant, small form factor, Bluetooth speaker with great sound, this is the one. If sound matters to you and is at the top of your must have list, then I don't think you can do much better than this speaker.
reviews.author: callmeageeth

reviews.title: Amazing little speaker!
reviews.text:
I was a bit taken aback when I saw the box of the product when it arrived. It was smaller than I was expecting. It had a good sturdy weight and is a great looking device. I did as instructed and charged it fully before use. At the time of writing this, I played it 4-5 hours and didn't have to charge again. It will also charge your devices as well! Now about the most important part of all: the sound. 

The sound quality is beyond amazing! It's size is deceiving in the sound that the little thing puts out! It's approx 8x11x8 and 5 lbs. The bass is great! It is extremely loud without distortion though I was afraid to turn it up all the way! I'm very pleased to have this awesome speaker and it seems now I have to fight my son for it! LOL! He's loving it as much as I am!
reviews.author: mskelbel

reviews.title: One of Best Portable Speakers Ever
reviews.text: The pure sound, extremely rugged build and ease of use provide a super portable speaker. This speaker has all the required controls in a simple array. I paired it easily with my phone and also my desktop, no re-pairing or second tries, it just pairs right immediately - that's a really nice reflection of the electronics. You also have an auxiliary input so you can attach directly to your device if desired. I actually had a small fender modelling amp which can run through a PC and you can use Fender Fuse software to add effects - I say this because I wanted to see how the effects would sound by playing a guitar through the Fender amp and then feeding the AUX output on the amp to the Audio Pro speaker. The amp is only 5 watts but now I have a 25 RMS watt system and both can function off batteries nice. By the way RMS means 'root mean square' so when a manufacturer uses this it's important because many manufacturers will use peak watts and it sounds like more. So this is a good manufacturer because they could have listed 35 peak watts if they chose to. One problem with guitar amps is that you can have a little noise sometimes and this test showed that the sound through the Audio Pro would remain pure over quite a lot of string banging. So I do recommend this little marvel highly, it's not cheap but it is worth it for the pure sound and portability.
reviews.author: RalphHenry

reviews.title: Big sound, small package
reviews.text:
This is not your average Bluetooth speaker. The first thing you will notice is the 2 wonderful textures. The front has a rough texture, almost like a rhino lining of a pickup bed. It feels very rough, tough and durable. The back of the unit is like a brushed aluminum. It gives it almost a commercial feel. The buttons are a nice aluminum as well that have a great feel for them.

The connection of a phone to the speaker is standard like most other Bluetooth speakers. You turn it on then hit the pair button. You then find it on the list of available devices on your phone and select it to pair. There is a button that will tell you how much battery life remaining.

The speaker sounds amazing! I played every type of music I could possible find on Pandora and my phone's media and it all sounded so good. I did not play it on full blast because i like to "break in" my speakers first before I push them too hard. The clarity of the music was very rich and vibrant while not being overpowered by messy bass. The balance is very nice and crisp.

The battery life is another one of the strong suites. It has such a long battery life that it even allows you to use the device as a battery charger for your phone. I have been using this regularly for the past few days and the battery status level is still showing full.

I really love this speaker and will be taking it with me everywhere I go in case there happens to be a need for some sweet music. It will be clutch.
reviews.author: Bootleg89

reviews.title: Amazing Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about the Audio Pro Addon T3.
It is Honestly the best bluetooth speaker I have used. The sound quality is excellent from low volumes to even when you max it out. I never heard any distortion or strain from the speaker.

The Battery Life is excellent I took it with me to work the other day and had it playing for 9 hours straight at about half volume, and it still had more than half the charge.

The design is also excellent while it is a bit blocky it is very sturdy and well designed. 

If you are in the market for a bluetooth speaker you cannot go wrong with this one.
reviews.author: masc360

reviews.title: Hi quality BT speaker with excellent sound
reviews.text:
BT speakers are a dime a dozen and range in price from maybe $10 on up to the hundreds of dollars. This one falls in the mid-range pricewise. Build quality is very impressive - it's heavy and made out of some kind of metal that gives it heft. It runs off battery and re-charges using a standard AC plug (instead of a micro-USB cable). I think this would allow it to charge much faster, so that's a definite plus. It pairs easily with your device and even has an AUX input if you want a direct wired connection. The back contains a USB port that you can use to simultaneously charge your device from the speaker's built in battery.

The only part I don't understand is that volume changes performed on the speaker are not mirrored on your device and vice versa. That means that if you change the volume on the speaker, it doesn't show the volume correspondingly change on my device (in my case, an iPhone). So, in effect, there are two volumes - that of the speaker and that of your device. If someone can comment on why this is so (and is different from all other BT devices I've used), that would be greatly appreciated.
reviews.author: pinkoos

reviews.title: Great Sound
reviews.text:
Love this thing. It has great sound, which is the thing most important in a speaker. It's crystal clear and has some decent bass sound. It fills our family room and kitchen without the needs for another speaker. Pairing was immediate and I was playing music 10 seconds after turning it on.

Battery life is good and it gets very loud. It's well designed and built It's not light. Definitely a carry and place somewhere speaker.

I would highly recommend this speaker.
reviews.author: DMNFL

reviews.title: Nice option
reviews.text: I wasn’t sure what to think when I received this. I’m used to my Bose speaker that I’ve had for years so I compare everything to that. This isn’t quite Bose quality but they work very well. Decent sound, adequate battery life. Definitely worth considering if you’re looking for a nice portable speaker.
reviews.author: KaeL

reviews.title: Awesome sound, classic look, and built to last
reviews.text:
The Audio Pro T3 is one solid speaker. And I mean solid in both ways. Solid build with heft to let you know the speaker has some weight to it, and solid as in a great overall device. When you pick this thing up you can just tell its well built. The initial charge time is about an hour or so. And its rated at 30 hours or 12 hours of full volume. Although if you just remember to connect it when your done I doubt you'll ever run out. 

 Connectivity is as simple as it gets. Just press the pair button and find the T3 the the Bluetooth settings of whatever device you are using. One click and your ready to go. And if you have a non Bluetooth device, or just want to connect via 3.5mm there is a port for that as well. Once connected you now get to hear just how powerful a small quality speaker can be. The bass is deep and the overall sound is crisp and well just sounds like it should if that makes sense. Not over done, just right. 

 It has a nice handle for carrying it around. Its portability is a great feature that other larger speakers just cant pull off. The look is kinda old school which is very cool. It also comes in several different colors so you can match it to your other devices or furniture. 

 Overall if you are looking for a Bluetooth speaker where you arent sacrificing sound quality due to a smaller device the T3 is the way to go. Amazing solid build, well balanced sound thats just right, with simple connectivity options make for a device that is easily recommendable. You cant go wrong here.
reviews.author: Nate34

reviews.title: Modern Design with Big Sound!
reviews.text:
Ill be the first to say this is NOTHING like any of my other Bluetooth speakers. It is however another Bluetooth speaker... in a much better way.

Whats in the box?
The packaging is relatively nice, nothing overly special. Comes with an EU wall adapter as well as an american wall power cord. The speaker is wrapped in a nice cloth material which makes it feel a little more special. Once you take the speaker outside all the packaging and set it on a table is when you can actually admire the beauty. 

Whats the design like?
The design of this speaker is VERY modern with a touch of retro somewhere... The handle is made out of a leather or fake leather material which at the very least feels great. The back and top around the buttons is metal which is cool to the touch and make sit feel very premium. The body has a nice texture which adds to the look of not being smooth and shiny like a cheaper speaker might. Overall I love the look!

How does it sound?
I will say the other Bluetooth speaker I use regularly is the regular Bose revolve. I LOVED nearly everything about that speaker minus the upright design. The 360 sound that thing produces is amazing though. The sound of the Audio Pro - Addon T3 though blows that thing out of the water! The crisp vocals and tight punchy bass allow for a much better listening experience. The volume the T3 can reach also is much higher than the Bose. Probably a good 25% higher and the distortion is lower than the Bose. I will say the Bose does reach a certain frequency around 75% volume that does sound deeper than the T3 surprisingly. I would much rather listen to the T3 though! Just a great speaker for the money! 

Conclusion?
The Audio Pro - Addon T3 is a speaker with quality sound in mind. There is almost nothing that let me down with the speaker other than the design is almost too good and delicate to be "portable" on your average occasion. I would highly recommend this speaker for anyone in the market! You will not be disappointed.
reviews.author: Justin

reviews.title: A Big Speaker in a Small PAckage
reviews.text:
I was thoroughly impressed with how big the sounbd is from this speaker. Boasting a battery life of 12 hours on full volume or 30 hours at 50% volume or lower, I found that 50% volume was more than adequate for most situations. I have a ton of Bluetooth speakers, but this one blows them away. In addition to Bluetooth, it also has an auxiliary 3.5mm stereo input so you can connect the T3 to any device that has a headphone jack, even if it doesn't support Bluetooth.

On top of everything, the Addon T3 has a feature I've been wanting in Bluetooth speakers for a long time: the ability to charge your phone from the speaker. The T3 has a full-size USB output that allows you to use the speaker's battery to charge other devices in a pinch. This can be a huge lifesaver if you bring your speaker along camping or at the beach.
reviews.author: TechGuru

reviews.title: Worthy Investment
reviews.text:
Simple Review: The sound quality alone earns a great recommendation from me but tie that in with a premium build that makes this speaker a easy choice.

In-depth Review: Starting with the in boxing you get what you expect. Speaker with a power cable instructions but it also includes overseas power cable too. Even when it comes to the speaker it has a quality cloth feeling wrapper protecting your new investment which is appreciated.

Unit came dead but that's no surprise but I was surprised that it took about 30 minutes for a full charge which this leads us into one of the best things about this speaker. I got over 30 hours of playing out to this! For something that is not too heavy to push that much time is amazing! One thing I think you should be aware is there no voice prompts when powering on our connecting to it etc. I also didn't enjoy the cheap feeling buttons they put on this premium build, it just ruins the experience a bit. Sounds quality is strong and deep. Voices very clear while bass strong enough for my tastes. I was surprised by the quality especially since I've never seen this brand myself but I'd say it's worth the investment. 

Add it all up and you get a great speaker for those looking for something that's not just cheap plastic. I hope my review helped you in your decision. Thanks
reviews.author: AverageConsumer

reviews.title: fantastic portable BT speaker
reviews.text:
good:
-sound quality - wow, this little guy sounds great. nothing missing from the spectrum, from top to bottom. lively, punchy, energetic, and clean, and no shortage of volume. very impressive at this price point.

-battery life - also impressive, about 30 hours at half volume, or about half that time at full volume.

-ease of use - buttons for power, pairing, and source (BT or aux). pairing happened quickly and only took a few seconds before I was up and running.

-design - somewhat industrial design, but very high quality feel and appearance. also has a leather handle for carrying, a usb port for charging external device, and an aux to connect an external player should you need to.



bad:
-not bad by any means, but some may not like the more industrial “old school” design. i personally quite like it, but i’ve always been a function over form kind of guy myself.
-no included remote. I personally don't mind as I wouldn't use it anyways.


overall:
-highly recommended. fantastic quality of build and design at this price point.
reviews.author: bd43274

reviews.title: Great Look, Great Sound
reviews.text:
Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Gray
On all their packaging, it states that this portable Bluetooth speaker is the "Sound of Scandinavia." Not only is the sound of Scandinavia, but also has the looks of Scandinavia; very clean industrial-like lines, matte gray finish with copper-colored control buttons-an extremely good looking speaker. The speaker comes with 2 cords for charging, one connects to an electrical outlet and the other is a USB that allows charging to either a computer, an ancillary power pack, etc. This speaker had no problems hooking up by Bluetooth to my Samsung telephone or my HP Spectre. It has a great range of sound with a very nice, strong box and brown leather handle. It is actually the color grey like advertised in pictures on the website. 

The only issue that I had was that the instructions were in many foreign languages, but the button identifiers did have an English option, but the instructions themselves were not in English. They must sell this unit all over the world and do not have language specific instructions for the country that this is specifically sold in. Although it is fairly simple to figure out how to run the machine, if you have worked wireless equipment before, it would not have been as simple for those people who have less experience with syncing their audio-playing devices to this Bluetooth speaker.
reviews.author: KansasMeddlingMom

reviews.title: Built to last for Decades!
reviews.text: My critique of the Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker - White is one of excellence. The first noticeable trait was the weight, when taking it out of the box, I could immediately notice how heavy and compact it is. It is constructed of steel or some type of metal. It is well built and the way it is constructed will allow it to last for decades. I had to charge it for about ninety minutes to get a full charge. Pairing with my devices was easy as just waiting to see the Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker show up on the screen after pressing search and then tap on it to pair. The sound is rich and strong, produced by three speakers. The woofer in the middle supplies deep bass frequencies, while the two tweeters give the higher octaves necessary to make music sound complete. The Audio Pro - Addon T3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker is a sturdy and functional system worth having.
reviews.author: TheTruthRealDeal

reviews.title: Excellent Design and Sound
reviews.text:
I have owned several bluetooth speakers over the years and this one ranks right up there with the best of them.

Loves:
- This unit is beautifully designed. It looks terrific on a shelf or bookcase. The leather carrying strap is a nice touch. And the metallic button layout is very sleek. The feet on the bottom give the speaker a slight upward angle which I liked.
- Battery life is outstanding at up to 30 hours. If you aren't taking it on the go, it can be left plugged into a wall outlet with the included cord. It comes with a power cord for European outlets if you plan to travel with it.
- It's loud and the bass is strong.
- Sound quality ranks up there with other well known brands.
- It has an AUX port if you need to connect a non-bluetooth device.
- You can charge your phone or other electronic device from the included USB port.

What's not to love?
- Nothing. I was thoroughly impressed with this speaker.

At this price point, it's a good buy and I recommend it for anyone looking for big sound on the go or for a stylish audio option in the home.
reviews.author: jsisko76

reviews.title: I love this speaker, and I'm very critical
reviews.text:
I'll tell you that I'm a music nut, and I love this speaker. 

Now, let me say that I've listened to, own, or have owned some very nice and not so nice bluetooth speakers. I love music and often try out speakers hoping for something better than what I have. Let me clarify that I don't buy $700-$1100 speakers, I'm talking about the $150-$300 speakers. I never found anything better than what I had, until this! 

Let me start by saying this is a very stylish speaker. Generally people notice how it looks first, then notice the sound second. That is part of the problem having such a good looking speaker. I am not that way, I look at sound first, and looks after that, but since we are on the topic, let me say that this one is a bit darker gray than in the picture - and has a beautiful gold colored control panel and a really cool brown leather handle with gold fasteners. I'm guessing this is one of the most sought after speaker color combos. 

This speaker has a real electrical cord that plugs into the back of the speaker, and it comes with not one, but two. It has a place for you to charge your phone using your phone's charging cable - a very nice touch to be able to charge while listening. And it has the much appreciated aux in jack, so you can plug in a 3.5mm standard mini plug from your satellite radio, ipod, etc. 

Turning this on and pairing was something you won't need to read about. Press and hold the power button, press and hold the pair button until the bluetooth light flashes, connect, and you are good to go. It really is this simple. 

This unit has a very long battery life though I haven't had enough time to test it - it is rated at like 30 hours or something. But if it gets 8 hours I'm good. So far, its holding up well. And you'll see there is a door on the bottom of the speaker, with special screws, so you can likely change the battery when that day sometime comes. 

The build quality is nothing less than suitable for royalty. I'm not kidding. It is amazing, amazing, amazing. Solid. And it feels heavy, but in a good way. I felt like I was carrying a $100,000 violin or something, as it is balanced, elegant, precious yet sturdy, etc. Top shelf. 

Where this speaker shines, above and beyond anything I've ever listened to, is the sound quality. There are two visible tweeters and a visible woofer. You'll feel the air pressure coming out of the hole in the back of the speaker, which is exhausting of the bass. 

The highs are perfect, and the bass is something I've never heard from any speaker in this class. But the more amazing part is that no matter what I hook up to it, it makes it sound better than it does on other speakers. No kidding. Satellite, Ipod, streaming, etc. all sound equally amazing with this speaker, something I've never experienced before with any speaker. 

I'm very critical of speakers, because I love my music. It might be Frank Sinatra, Beethoven, Aerosmith, Blake Shelton, or even some show tunes. All of these sound amazing on this speaker. I thought I knew what was a decent sound before, but I had no idea how great my music could sound on this truly amazing speaker. 

It isn't as small as you might think, in particular as bluetooth speakers have tried to get smaller and better sounding - our baseline of what size these should be has shrunk. But make no mistake, this is worth every bit of space it takes up and you will not regret buying this speaker. Frankly it is as much a decoration as an amazing speaker! The long battery life and USB charging port are only a bonus. 

Funny, I would have thought this speaker was a $700 speaker, based solely on sound. And I did blind sound tests. This was by far the best of the many speakers I own; I did this because I could not believe something so affordable could sound so amazing. It is true, it is really amazing. 

Thanks for developing a speaker that looks and sounds great but is also affordable to those who really want the best sounding speaker available. 
I only wish I could include more than 2 pics with this review, because seeing it is believing, but hearing it will be the main selling point to you. 

Oh yes, the packaging is also top shelf, a box that is worth holding onto because this is something you'll want to pass down to someone in your family some day. It takes something really special for me to feel this way, and I'm very critical, but this has sold me.
reviews.author: stevefromtheburbs

reviews.title: OMG so loud...
reviews.text: I can't believe how loud this thing is, and truly how amazing the sound is. I'm blown away. This is a must have if you are into music, please check this one out.
reviews.author: mrjlwilliams

reviews.title: Excellent sound, appearance and powerful bass!
reviews.text:
I used to have a Bose Speaker, and I used to think that nothing would compare to the sound of the Bose. Well, this unit really and gladly surprised me. The sound quality and appearance of this is fantastic. The price is more than fair, simple and compact and it was very easy to pair to any device I had at home, lets say, tablet, ipad, iphone, android. Amazing deep bass and clear high range. Good idea that it charges with a standard wire. Good looking, kind of heavy for the small size, however it feels reliable and sturdy.

The battery last a lot, according to the specs it states that 30 hours at half volume, I haven’t had the chance to deplete it completely, but I have played music for 14 hours and it is still up and running. 

So if you are looking for a portable Bluetooth speaker that delivers good sound at an affordable price, this is the unit you are looking for, highly recommended!
reviews.author: GEJF

reviews.title: Good-Looking & Fantastic-Quality Speaker
reviews.text:
======= Summary =======

The Audio Pro Addon T3 bluetooth speaker is a well-built, well-balanced, and high-quality audio device with a great design.


======= Design ======= 

Design and aesthetics are subjective but I think the design of the Audio Pro Addon T3 is fantastic~!! The rectangular white cabinet body with its round blacker speaker cutouts look dashing, stylish, modern, and elegant. The genuine leather black handle further enhances its design and is a nice touch. Touch is an important experience too and it just feels nice grabbing the speaker by its thick, quality leather strap handle instead of touching some cheap plastic piece.

The cabinet is also smooth to the touch and feels premium. So is the metal cut-out that houses all the metal buttons. Pressing the buttons gives great tactile feedback and they are a pleasure to use. No wiggling, no clickty annoying sounds. Just reassuring and firm button presses. 

The speaker weighs about 6 to 7 pounds and feels solid and dense in a quality sort of way. 

To sum it all up, the whole speaker unit is made of great build materials and the fit-and-finish is impeccable. It is pleasure to look at and a pleasure to handle. 


======= Connectivity Options =======

I appreciate that the Audio Pro T3 offers both a Bluetooth and AUX cable connection. My Samsung Galaxy S8+ quickly found and easily paired up with the Audio Pro in a seamless manner. I also tested out the speaker by connecting my desktop soundcard to the AUX port on the back of the speaker with a 3.5mm audio cable and everything worked great. 

Also present on the back of the speaker is a USB charging port for devices such as cellphones and tablets as well as a charging port for the speaker. The USB charging port only outputs 1A so its usefulness is kind of limited but it is still a nice option to have nonetheless. It is better to have than not have. 


======= Sound Quality ======= 

Sound quality is great~! From its two 2 & 3/4" 5W textile dome tweeters & its 15W 3.5" subwoofer (with a frequency range between 60 - 20,000 Mhz), music and audio flow out loudly, cleanly, and with good dynamic range and projection. 

The Audio Pro T3 handles all types of music very well - pop, hip-hop, rock, vocals, electronica, instrumental, etc. 

Turn up the volume and the speaker can really rumble and spit out tight and punchy bass. Vocal separation is excellent as are details in the strings.

The volume can get very loud and it can easily fill out small to medium-sized rooms. I was impressed by how far the audio was projected.

With the sound quality so good and clear, the Audio Pro T3 can even replace my mid-level 5.1 PC speaker system which is currently connected to my desktop gaming PC.


======= Is it any good? Is is a good buy? =======

Most definitely~! I will recommend the Audio Pro Addon T3 speaker without any hesitation to anyone who is looking for a high-quality, well-built, good-looking portable speaker with excellent sound quality. I wasn't familiar with the Audio Pro brand prior to using this speaker but they have created a very positive impression on me.
reviews.author: optimummind

reviews.title: Hefty speaker with incredible design and sound
reviews.text:
This is a very substantial speaker, both in style and in weight. The heft of the speaker likely comes from a huge battery, as the device uses a household 120V cord to charge itself, rather than a common USB cord that lighter speakers use.

Pros
====
* Gorgeous design. This speaker will look good in every interior design style, except for perhaps something Victorian or rustic.
* Bluetooth pairing with an iPad and Android phone was almost instantaneous.
* Very satisfying sound. Three front-firing speakers for high and mid-range and a passive subwoofer in the back should accommodate most musical tastes.
* No distortion at full volume listening to both Olivia Newton-John and Pantera, two very different artists that put different demands on a speaker.
* Very strong bass, if that's your taste.

Cons
====
* Very strong bass, with no equalizer on the device itself. 
* Very hefty; once it's set down on a desk, don't expect to be casually moving it around.


This speaker is plenty capable of being portable, but I don't see myself doing that a whole lot. With its claimed 30 hours of portable use at 50% volume, it'd be perfect for putting wherever you want. That half-volume is still plenty loud, but you always have to return it to its standard power cord tether, which you likely left dangling out of the wall when you last charged it.
reviews.author: HappyPhantom
